A [[Fish/Legends|fish]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known as '''sez''' was native to the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of the<ref name="GCG" /> [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. The species' name was used as a family name by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]],<ref name="GCG" /> a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] species native to Bothawui.<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> [[Mak Sezala]], a Bothan [[Senator/Legends|senator]] serving the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]], had "sez" as part of his surname,<ref name="SBS">''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''</ref> along with the clan suffix "ala."<ref name="GCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The species known as sez was first mentioned in the ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'', a [[2003]] sourcebook written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]] and [[J.D. Wiker]] for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''. The plural form of the species name and its level of sentience were not mentioned in the book, which mentioned the species in a table of Bothan family names.<ref name="GCG" />
